hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then bun run check && bun run typecheck; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then bun run check && bun run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh api|gh pr|gh issue|gh run'; then echo '⚠ GitHub API 호출 감지. 로컬에서 가능한 작업인지 먼저 확인하세요. rate limit 낭비 주의.'; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git .*(--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign)'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: --no-verify / --no-gpg-sign 사용 금지 (Tier 1 불변 원칙).' && exit 1; elif echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push.*--force' && ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q -- '--force-with-lease'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: git push --force 금지. --force-with-lease를 사용하세요.' && exit 1; elif echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git reset --hard'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: git reset --hard 금지. stash 또는 새 브랜치를 사용하세요.' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|git clean -fd'; then echo '⚠ 파괴적 명령 감지. 실행 전 반드시 확인하세요.'; fi

hooks.prompt:
End-of-turn quality gate for Astro monorepo (apps/landing + apps/app).

STEP 1: Run `git status --porcelain` to identify changed files. If no changed files, respond {"ok": true}.
Categorize by APP and TYPE:
- APP: landing (apps/landing/**), app (apps/app/**), root (everything else)
- TYPE: UI (.astro/.css), Pages (pages/**/*.astro), Tokens (tokens.css), Config (astro.config.*), TS (.ts/.tsx)

STEP 2: Per category, grep changed files for violations:

[DESIGN TOKENS & CSS]
- Hardcoded colors: #hex, rgb(, hsl(, oklch( NOT inside var()
- Hardcoded spacing: raw px values not using var(--space-*)
- Missing @layer in new CSS files (expected: @layer reset, base, tokens, components, utilities)
- !important usage (forbidden)
- Hardcoded font-family not using var()
- text-align: justify (forbidden)

[ASTRO COMPONENTS]
- client:load on non-critical components (prefer client:visible or client:idle)
- Inline <style> without CSS custom properties/tokens
- Missing prefers-reduced-motion on animations
- Animating width/height/top/left (use transform/opacity)
- Starlight: slug: '' usage (use link: '/' instead)

[TYPESCRIPT]
- @ts-ignore, biome-ignore, eslint-disable, as any (forbidden — 오류 정공법)
- Hardcoded secrets: patterns like sk_, pk_, ghp_, API_KEY=, SECRET=, TOKEN=, password=

[ARCHITECTURE — 불변 원칙]
- Cross-app imports: apps/landing/ must NOT import from apps/app/ or vice versa
- Non-Cloudflare platform imports: @vercel, @aws-sdk, @google-cloud, @netlify
- Error suppression in any file type: @ts-ignore, biome-ignore, eslint-disable

STEP 3: Check AND UPDATE memory/pattern-history.md:
- If violations found: read the table. If pattern exists, increment count + update date. If new, append row: | description | 1 | today's date | TRACKING |.
- If any pattern reaches count 3, change status to ESCALATE.
- If no violations: read only, do not modify.

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.
If no violations: {"ok": true}
If violations found: {"ok": false, "reason": "## Quality Gate: FAIL\n- [severity] file:line — description"}

Check if architecture/design decisions were made in this turn. If yes, append to memory/decisions-log.md with format:

## [date] [title]
- 결정: ...
- 근거: ...
- 대안: ...
- 선택 이유: ...

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.
If no decisions were made: {"ok": true}
If decisions were logged: {"ok": true}
